label_verbatim: (Name of Limited Partnership as it appears on the records of the Secretary of State)
rationale: LP name as it appears on the SOS record. Must match record exactly so SOS can identify the entity whose RA slot is being vacated.

label_verbatim: FIRST: (name of current noncommercial registered agent)
rationale: Name of the noncommercial registered agent of record (i.e., the resigning party / filer). Reuses the established registered_agent.* namespace per CORP_MBCA-3A-NCRA / CORP_MBCA-12E-NCRA / LLC_MLLC-3A-NCRA precedent. (Drafter proposed `resigning_agent.name`; corrected during review.)

label_verbatim: (physical street address, city, state and zip code – as it appears on the record)
rationale: Single-line physical address of the noncommercial RA of record. Form explicitly says 'as it appears on the record' — value must match SOS record verbatim, not the agent's current preferred address. (Drafter proposed `resigning_agent.physical_address`; corrected.)

label_verbatim: SECOND: (insert name) — person at the LP to receive §111 notice
rationale: Name of the person at the LP to whom the agent will deliver the §111-required notice of resignation. Reuses the existing resignation_notice.* namespace from the NCRA family. (Drafter proposed `resignation_notice_recipient.name`; corrected to dotted-suffix form for namespace consistency.)

label_verbatim: (mailing address including zip code) — for §111 notice
rationale: Mailing address (single line incl. ZIP) where the §111 notice of resignation will be sent. (Drafter proposed `resignation_notice_recipient.mailing_address`; corrected.)

Title of the person at the LP receiving the §111 notice. Form caption is the broad '(title of person notified)' — for an LP this is typically 'General Partner' (not corporate-officer titles). Same caption as LLC_MLLC-3A-NCRA.
Date the statement of resignation is signed; resignation takes effect 31 days after this filing is delivered to the LP.

label_verbatim: (type or print name) — below the (signature of noncommercial registered agent) caption
rationale: Signer printed name (Shape B — name only, no separate title widget). The signer is by definition the resigning RA whose name was already entered at Text2; redundant by design (form acts as both attestation and signature). Same as the rest of the NCRA family.

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up

rationale: Total fees ($35 base per page-0 header plus expedite premium).

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
label_verbatim: Contact email address for this filing

widget_id: Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: Email address to use for annual report reminders
rationale: Annual-report reminder email (applies to the LP; resignation does not affect annual-report obligations — only the RA slot).
